_comment: Binds the committed confidential SP1 guest ELFs to the verifying keys they must be deployed with. Two ELFs from one `cargo prove build`: elf/cxfer-guest (the settle guest → program_vkey, immutable PROGRAM_VKEY) and elf/reflection-prover (the Bitcoin-state relay prover → bitcoin_relay_vkey, immutable BITCOIN_RELAY_VKEY). verify-vkey-pin.sh asserts both sha256s on every PR. A rebuild that changes either ELF MUST regenerate its vkey + update this file IN THE SAME COMMIT, then redeploy ConfidentialPool with the new immutable vkey — otherwise every settle (resp. every attestBitcoinStateProven) reverts. Each vkey is the key a REAL Groth16 proof of THAT ELF verifies against on-chain (test/ConfidentialSwapProofReal.t.sol, test/ConfidentialReflectionProofReal.t.sol). The two share cxfer-core, so a cxfer-core change rebuilds BOTH — committing the ELFs is what keeps the prover box running the pinned bytes rather than a drifting rebuild.
_vkey_authority: program_vkey + bitcoin_relay_vkey are the AUTHORITATIVE deploy vkeys for the committed ELFs; guest_state below is descriptive prose only (it has lagged the fields before). The vkey<->ELF binding is enforced mechanically at prove time by the EXPECT_VKEY / ELF_VKEY_PIN guard in exec-prove.rs (program_vkey) and exec-reflect-prove.rs (bitcoin_relay_vkey), and at deploy time by DeployConfidentialPool's require(vkey == .program_vkey). After any ELF rebuild, derive both vkeys on the prover host and reconcile every field here in the same commit.
_pending_reprove: FINALIZED 2026-06-14 — MAINNET RE-PROVE STAGED (the live Sepolia deploy vkeys below stay frozen + valid). reflect.rs SOURCE is now ahead of the committed reflection ELF (sha a25f9003, vkey 0x005e6adc, both UNCHANGED + still valid on Sepolia): it gained the TAC burn-deposit dispatch (verify_provenance over a pre-anchor provenance chain, compile-verified via cargo prove build), which rotates BITCOIN_RELAY_VKEY at the next re-prove. The mainnet re-prove (ops/CHECKLIST-mainnet-reprove.md + ops/DESIGN-trustless-asset-onboarding.md) bundles this dispatch + the mainnet config (ETH_GENESIS_SYNC_COMMITTEE / ETH_REFLECTION_VKEY / Bitcoin genesis anchor); settle 0x00d5b572 is mainnet-config-independent, unchanged unless settle changes. The committed reflection ELF below contains (Sepolia finalization): asset-preservation + per-output vout-derivation + the AMM constant-product consolidation (createPair/isqrt first-mint/min-share LP/OP_SWAP_ROUTE/per-op deadline) + Mode B reverse-bridge recursion (reflection verify_sp1_proof against the eth-reflection guest) + cBTC.zk (fold_cbtc_lock self-custody + the digest-bound cbtcBackingSats 10th PV field). The committed source == the committed ELFs (working tree clean; cargo-prove cfb5544 is deterministic — the cBTC re-prove built these exact bytes from this source). PROGRAM_VKEY 0x00d5b572 and BITCOIN_RELAY_VKEY 0x005e6adc are FROZEN: the reflection genesis sync-committee anchor is 0x8a83300119ac1e64a2318d3db330ed496c51276c636a93633b2d5cfd283c2d44 (Sepolia finalizedSlot 10462624), frozen for this deploy — re-anchoring is a future weak-subjectivity op that would rotate the vkey. The freeze is mechanically enforced: verify-vkey-pin.sh asserts the reflection leg == FROZEN_REFLECTION_VKEY/SHA + the reflection_groth16 fixture vkey, and readiness-gate layer 9 allowlists 0x005e6adc only with its both-sided REFLECT-1 confirmation. Neither vkey can rotate except by a deliberate coordinated re-prove (rebuild BOTH ELFs -> new vkeys -> regenerate all *ProofReal + this pin + the drift guard FROZEN_* + the allowlist + the DeployConfidentialPool DEFAULT_VKEY, in one commit). Deploy locks PROGRAM_VKEY + BITCOIN_RELAY_VKEY immutable.
guest_state: Settle guest (cxfer-guest, 0x00d5b572, sha c49ba0d3): gen-1 op set + OP_SWAP (fee-enforced clearing) + OP_LP_ADD (isqrt geometric-mean first-mint + V2 min-share) / OP_LP_REMOVE (in-guest MINIMUM_LIQUIDITY floor) + OP_SWAP_ROUTE (<=4-hop constant-product multihop) + OP_OTC + OP_BID; per-op DEADLINE (Expired); createPair lazy pools; pool_id binds the canonical pair + feeBps; amounts bound by opening sigmas. Reflection prover (reflection-prover, 0x005e6adc, sha a25f9003): full-scan witnessed Bitcoin-state relay + REFLECT-1 value-conservation + CXFER asset-preservation + per-output vout-derivation + Mode B reverse-bridge recursion (verify_sp1_proof against the eth-reflection guest hash_u32 vkey, genesis anchor 0x8a83…) + cBTC.zk fold_cbtc_lock self-custody with digest-bound cbtcBackingSats (10th BitcoinReflectionPublicValues field; the off-pool CbtcBuffer reads it). Lineage: settle 0x00bb82ef->0x00c11f48->0x009cb098->0x0026dabb(AMM)->0x00d5b572(cBTC); reflection 0x0099e1c7->0x00687472->0x00afe060->0x002d2536(ModeB)->0x004d8dbd(AMM)->0x005e6adc(cBTC).
